title: Update call sites: provide device_id to PublishKeyPackageParams
description:
Update all sites that construct PublishKeyPackageParams to provide a device_id.

Sites (all must be updated):
- cli/src/commands.rs:567
- cli/src/commands.rs:702
- tui/src/event.rs:537
- relay/tests/sealed_sender_e2e.rs:152

Algorithm for each site:
1. After constructing the KeyPackage bytes (the data field), compute device_id = hex(sha256(&data))
2. Use sha2::Sha256::digest(&data), format as lowercase hex with format!({:x}, result) or hex::encode()
3. For tui: add sha2 = { workspace = true } to tui/Cargo.toml if not present
4. For relay/tests: use sha2 or hex crate already available in dev-deps

Defensive rules:
- device_id must be computed from data before constructing the struct
- Never hardcode a device_id string in production code
acceptance_criteria: cargo build --workspace succeeds; all call sites compile with device_id field populated
